articles.title: West Asia Conflict: Austerity measures to impact diesel, petrol demand growth
articles.excerpt: The austerity measures activated by the government to preserve economic stability, reign-in inflation and ensure energy security is putting pressure on India’s demand growth for key transport fuels—diesel and petrol.

articles.title: India turns net importer of finished steel in April, data shows
